name: Stripe Billing
description: Recurring subscription billing for client retainers. Create a $399/mo subscription per client, send payment link, Stripe handles automatic monthly charging and failed payment retries. Not a WordPress plugin — managed at dashboard.stripe.com.
config_notes: One-time setup: create a Product called 'Monthly Retainer' with a $399/mo recurring Price. This generates a single Payment Link — reuse this same link for every client. When a client submits the link, Stripe automatically creates their Customer record and starts their subscription on that date. Enable automatic retries for failed payments in Stripe dashboard settings.
